title: Replace an O(n^2) helper with a Map-based single pass
task: `tally` in src/tally.js is correct but quadratic: it rescans the result array with a nested loop for every input value. Refactor it to a single pass using a Map while keeping the exact same return shape (array of { value, count }) and first-seen ordering. The nested inner loop must be gone. Do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify behavior is unchanged.
notes: Behavior is pinned by the tests; the content checks (supported by the harness) assert the nested-loop marker is gone and a Map is actually used.
